title.en: In an instant, his immeasurable will began to r...

content.en:
The entrance to the glow gap that cut off the forbidden area has disappeared, but the glow gap naturally does not disappear, it still exists, so Ye Tian's copy body is also in the glow gap.

But Ye Tian knew very well that it was impossible for his duplicate body to survive forever in the gap of the glow.

There will inevitably be danger here in the future, and if there is no danger, the avatars who cut off the forbidden area will not leave here.

However, his purpose is to use this ray of light to enhance his immeasurable will before danger comes.

Soon, his replica body absorbed a ray of glow, and the glow was absorbed by the immeasurable will.

In an instant, his immeasurable will began to rise rapidly.

"What a terrifying effect!"

Ye Tian was extremely surprised.

Although he expected that this kind of glow could enhance his immeasurable will, he didn't expect the effect to be so good!

His immeasurable will now reached 53 scales, but he felt that he only needed to completely absorb this ray of light for his immeasurable will to reach 54 scales.

You must know that in the outside world, it will take a long time and a lot of resources for him to raise his immeasurable will by a scale, but here he only needs to absorb a ray of light.

"Xiaguang Gap, what the hell is this place, it's too mysterious!"

Ye Tian still held back his curiosity and did not explore, but looked for the glow to absorb it.

His most important goal at the moment is to improve the immeasurable will, and nothing else matters.

There is still a lot of glow in the gap of the glow, and a wisp will appear every once in a while, but as long as it cannot be absorbed in time, the glow will disappear.

And Ye Tian's reaction was very fast, but it took time to refine the glow, so he couldn't absorb and refine every ray of glow.

As time passed, Ye Tian's immeasurable will became stronger and stronger.

60 scales!

70 scales!

This kind of ascension was too fast, and due to the crazy surge of the immeasurable will, Ye Tian's immeasurable Dao domain was also getting stronger and stronger, and his strength was naturally getting stronger and stronger.

This kind of opportunity to quickly improve the immeasurable will is too rare, so Ye Tian can stay here all the time, plus this kind of glow is too suitable for improving the immeasurable will.

A long time passed, and on this day, Ye Tian found that his immeasurable will had been raised to the level of 80 scales, and his strength had skyrocketed a lot.

"My current strength shouldn't have been raised to the second tier of the Ninefold Ancestor!"

Ye Tian estimated.

This possibility still exists, but it is also possible that it is still worse.

After all, he has not made much progress in other aspects, and although the improvement of immeasurable will can improve his strength, it will not be too exaggerated.

So, he went to break into the fourth floor of the Qi Blood Sky Tower, and sure enough, it was still a little close.

In the following years, Ye Tian still focused on improving the immeasurable will, after all, it was still too difficult to improve other aspects.

In the blink of an eye, hundreds of billions of years of the Origin Era have passed.

Even if the glow of light is getting weaker and weaker for him, absorbing a large amount of glow can still temper the immeasurable will and make the immeasurable will slowly improve.

Now, his immeasurable will has been raised to 99 scales, and he is only one scale away from being able to raise to 100 scales!

According to Ye Tian's understanding, the immeasurable will of this level of 100 scale has almost reached the minimum level of the immeasurable will of the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor.

Because according to the information he inquired, some of the weaker Supreme Nine Ancestors, their immeasurable will was also around 100 scales.

After the immeasurable will reached a hundred scales, his immeasurable Dao domain was already extremely terrifying, and it could directly suppress some of the Ninefold Primordial Ancestors to be unable to move.

And his strength has also reached the second level of the Ninefold Ancestor as he wished, and this strength has already ranked among the top fifty ranks of the Ninefold Building.

It is more difficult to improve his strength if he reaches this point, unless he breaks through the life level or the immeasurable path, he can't quickly improve his strength.

Therefore, he did his best to use the resources collected from the Interception Source Sea and the Interception Forbidden Zone to improve his life level and cultivation, and improve his strength as quickly as possible.

However, this is not something that can be done in a short period of time.

this day.

When Ye Tian's copy body was absorbing and refining the glow in the glow gap, he suddenly felt the glow crack vibrate.

At this moment, he felt the existence of a crisis.

Abrupt.

A pitch-black creature emerged in the dark area outside the glow gap, and the appearance of this creature directly caused the entire glow gap to stagger.

"Oh no, this creature is definitely comparable to the fortifier level!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

In the face of such beings, he did not even have the ability to resist.

And so it happened, he was killed in one move.

Maybe the creature was just passing by, but it was so murderous that it was dead when it saw it.

And before the fall of this replica body, it also sensed the talent of this creature.

But after spying on it, Ye Tian was shocked.

From this creature, he actually sensed an ancestral endowment that surpassed the Yuan Dao Ancestral Endowment—the Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment!

【Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment: Darkness】

He originally wanted to copy this immeasurable ancestral endowment, but found that he couldn't copy it at all, and the level of the copying talent was still slightly weaker than the immeasurable ancestral endowment, so there was no way to copy the immeasurable ancestral endowment.

But at this moment, Ye Tian is not only not disappointed, but very excited, which means that there is still potential to copy talent and upgrade!

If he upgraded his copying talent to the level of Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment, wouldn't he be able to copy the other party's Immeasurable Ancestral Endowment?

"Judging from the snooping of the copy talent, that creature is called Black Roar, and the Black Roar at the fortification level, where does it come from?"

Ye Tian was curious.

There are so many Silent Black Sea, Truncated Forbidden Zone, and Primordial Ancient Sea's Supreme Enhancement Substance Rank or Extreme Ninefold Ancestor, and as a result, a Strengthened Substance-level Black Roar casually appeared here.

"There are too many secrets to cut off the forbidden area, I'm afraid that even the Nine Buildings may not know where the black roar comes from!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

The replica had been killed, and the entrance to the Glowing Rift was gone, so he couldn't enter the Glowing Rift now.

"It's a pity that such a treasure land!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Although after a long time, the entrance to the Xiaguang Gap will still appear in the Truncated Forbidden Zone, but that is a long time later, and by that time, he may already be the Supreme Ninefold Ancestor, and he will not need the treasure land of the Xiaguang Gap.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's life level finally broke through again after consuming and cutting off the countless resources of the Source Sea, reaching the level of 105 life level.

At the same time, his strength has skyrocketed again.
